## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Environment
- **SDK/Platform:** (e.g. Unity 2023.3, Flutter, Web3, JavaScript)
- **SDK Version:** (e.g. 5.1.0)
- **OS/Browser:** (e.g. Windows 11, iOS 17, Chrome 120)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Logs / Screenshots
If applicable, add logs or screenshots.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
